signup.title: Create Account
signup.heading: Create Account
login.pageTitle: Login — Football Agent Exam Prep Platform
login.heading: Login
login.lead: Access your dashboard, continue your revision, and track your progress.
dashboard.pageTitle: Dashboard — Football Agent Exam Prep Platform
dashboard.heading: Welcome to your learning dashboard
dashboard.lead: Continue your revision, access your study topics, and track your exam preparation progress.
dashboard.studyText: Browse your study topics and begin answering practice questions.
dashboard.progressText: Your statistics and topic performance will appear here as soon as you start answering questions.
dashboard.note: This platform is an independent exam preparation resource and is not affiliated with or endorsed by FIFA.
topics.pageTitle: Study Topics — Football Agent Exam Prep Platform
topics.heading: Choose a topic to start revising
topics.lead: Select a revision area and begin practising exam-style questions with multilingual support.
topics.error: Unable to load topics right now.
startInstructions: Select your preferred language for this exam. Once you are ready, click Start Exam to load the questions and begin the timed mock exam. You will have 60 minutes to complete 20 questions. Your selected language will remain fixed for the entire exam.
upgrade.heading: Upgrade Your Access
upgrade.lead: Choose the plan that best fits your preparation.
upgrade.title: Choose the plan that matches your FIFA exam ambition.
upgrade.lead: Choose the plan that best fits your preparation.
upgrade.point1Text: Structured, serious and multilingual preparation for a niche professional qualification.
upgrade.point2Text: Designed for users preparing with intent, not casual free browsing.
upgrade.point3Text: A learning environment with guided tools, online playbook access and evolving premium resources.
upgrade.sideTitle: What paid access is preparing for
upgrade.sideLead: This platform is being structured so that premium members can progressively access the most valuable preparation tools.
upgrade.alreadyAccount: Already have an account? Log in
upgrade.plansLead: Select the access level that best suits your preparation intensity and support expectations.
upgrade.starterLead: For candidates who want a serious first premium step beyond free signup.
upgrade.starterFeature4: Clear upgrade path to more intensive support
upgrade.proLead: For serious candidates who want the strongest balance of value, depth and preparation intent.
upgrade.proFeature1: Positioned as the core premium preparation offer
upgrade.proFeature2: Built for committed candidates preparing properly
upgrade.proFeature3: Suitable for deeper use of premium academy tools
upgrade.proFeature4: Ideal midpoint between affordability and intensity
upgrade.premiumLead: For candidates seeking the highest-value preparation tier in a serious professional niche.
upgrade.premiumFeature1: Premium positioning aligned with specialist exam prep value
upgrade.premiumFeature2: Best suited to candidates wanting the highest commitment level
upgrade.premiumFeature3: Strong premium signal versus low-ticket generic courses
countdown.title: Countdown to the next FIFA Football Agent Exam
countdown.lead: The FIFA Football Agent exam is held only once per year. Serious candidates prepare before the exam window closes.
upgrade.plansLead: Select the access level that best suits your preparation intensity and support expectations.
seo.title: Agent Academy | Global Management Consultancy Limited
seo.description: Agent Academy by Global Management Consultancy Limited: FIFA mock exams, practice quizzes, online playbook, and professional football agent learning resources.
hero.title: Welcome to Agent Academy
hero.text: Access FIFA mock exams, practice quizzes, the online football agent playbook, and structured learning resources designed for serious candidates and practising professionals.
cards.mock.title: FIFA Mock Exams
cards.mock.text: Sit a timed exam simulation with weighted question selection, regulation coverage, scenario questions, and anti-repeat logic built around your growing question bank.
cards.quiz.title: Practice Quiz
cards.quiz.text: Revise by topic, question type, and regulation area through interactive practice mode. Ideal for daily study, fast revision and targeted repetition.
cards.playbook.title: Online Playbook / E-book
cards.playbook.text: Access the Football Agent Exam & Regulations Playbook as a structured online resource. This will evolve into a linked digital reading experience with references, source material, practical examples and navigation across the regulatory framework.
cards.playbook.metaText: structured reading, revision and reference study
cards.signIn.title: Sign In
cards.signIn.text: Existing users can access their Academy area, continue their study journey, and later review their saved activity and premium resources.
cards.signup.title: Create Account
cards.signup.text: New users can create an Academy account to unlock free resources first, with paid courses, playbook access and premium learning layers added progressively.
upgrade.plansLead: Select the access level that best suits your preparation intensity and support expectations.
launch.label: Launch note:
launch.text: for version 1, the essential live components are the Academy entry page, sign in, sign up, practice quiz, FIFA mock exam and the online playbook. Dashboard, results tracking and advanced user profile pages can be layered in after initial launch.
playbookCta.title: Start with the Playbook
playbookCta.text: Read the structured learning guide before starting topic quizzes. Understand key FIFA regulations, then test yourself with exam-style questions.
studyCta.title: Study the Playbook or try the Mock Exam
studyCta.text: Read the structured learning guide before starting topic quizzes, or open the mock exam to experience timed exam-style practice.
